@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個以台股開市前評估與單股研究為核心的研究網站，展示 AI analyst 如何先讀取台股夜盤與美股趨勢，再透過正式會議完成訊號評估、風格切換與決策整合。 Taiwan Stock Radar is a research website for Taiwan premarket assessment and single-stock analysis through formal multi-agent review and style adaptation.

@graph.name: Taiwan Stock Radar
@graph.description: Taiwan Stock Radar 是一個開源台股 AI research skill，先建立台股夜盤與美股趨勢的開市前評估，再讓多位 specialist AI analyst 對同一檔股票開會，完成訊號引擎評估、風格切換、策略選擇與操作計畫。 Taiwan Stock Radar is an open-source Taiwan equity research skill that starts with a premarket brief and then runs a specialist AI committee around one stock.
